# The five-beat multi-window wow demo: recorded journey on the workstation

## Context

Epic `#15239`'s capstone leaf — the five-beat screenplay as a scripted, recorded, witness-backed journey on the flagship workstation. The screenplay draft exists (posted on `#14789` during D#15204's cycle-1; the Step-Back's authority ruling keeps `#14789`'s four-beat fusion tour UNCHANGED — this leaf owns the five-beat popup-over-popup story). Lane: the screenplay is @neo-fable-clio's drafted artifact; assignment stays self-select at execution time.

## The Problem

The epic's differentiator story — living instances moving across real OS windows on the shared heap, the thing portal-hack architectures cannot do — must exist as a REPRODUCIBLE journey: scripted beats, real pointer, headed recording, worker-truth asserts. Marketing claims without an executable journey rot; the render-verify culture demands the recording be regenerable at any head.

## The Architectural Reality

- The five beats (the epic body): tear-out → convert-while-dragging → popup-over-popup previews → dock-in-popup → whole-stack reintegration with self-closing vessel.
- Vehicle: the workstation (the standalone flagship) + the whitebox NL harness (`DemoADragMenuNL` precedent: real pointer, worker-truth reads) + the tour system where scripted beats need captions.
- Every beat consumes shipped leaves: G1/G2 (beats 1–2), G3 (beat 3), G4 (beat 5), the shared `#15207` consumer (affordances), the `#15206`/OQ4-selected language (the skin).
- Blocked-by: `#15246` (G3) + `#15247` (G4) — the last leaf in the merge order.
- Claim discipline (the epic body's framing guard): the surveyed docking libraries did not provide window-independent live-state docking as of the ADR 0029 §4 survey — revalidate before any release copy asserts uniqueness.

## The Fix

One PR: the scripted five-beat journey spec (headed, real pointer, all five beats in ONE run) + the recording pipeline (regenerable video/frames per the evidence conventions) + worker-truth asserts per beat, on the workstation.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] One headed scripted run executes all five beats consecutively on the workstation with a real pointer; each beat carries a worker-truth assert (document topology + same-instance identity + streaming-data continuity — heartbeats never reset across every transition).
- [ ] The run is recorded (regenerable at any head — the recording artifact's location/pipeline documented in the spec header) and the beats are caption-scriptable for the release cut.
- [ ] Beat 3 witnesses the claim determinism visibly (two popups overlapping, exactly one previews); beat 5 witnesses the vessel self-close AFTER commit.
- [ ] Reduced-motion and the selected preview language both honored (the journey runs under the OQ4-selected skin once the operator's pick lands; until then, under default).
- [ ] The uniqueness claim in any attached copy follows the framing guard (survey-bounded wording, revalidated at release time).

## Out of Scope

Any mechanism (all shipped by predecessor leaves) · `#14789`'s four-beat fusion tour (unchanged, separate) · release marketing copy itself (the journey provides the material).

## Related

Parent `#15239` · blocked-by `#15246` + `#15247` · `#14789` (adjacent, unchanged) · `#15241` (the portal registration rides the same "done" wave) · D#15204 (the North Star section).
